400             _collect_signatures(stmt.body, signatures)
401         elif isinstance(stmt, IfStmt):
402             _collect_signatures(stmt.then_branch, signatures)
403             if stmt.else_branch:
404                 _collect_signatures(stmt.else_branch, signatures)
405         elif isinstance(stmt, WhileStmt):
406             _collect_signatures(stmt.body, signatures)
407         elif isinstance(stmt, TryStmt):
408             _collect_signatures(stmt.try_branch, signatures)
409             if stmt.catch_branch:
410                 _collect_signatures(stmt.catch_branch, signatures)
411             if stmt.finally_branch:
412                 _collect_signatures(stmt.finally_branch, signatures)

510 def _validate_expr(expr: Expr, signatures: dict[str, int], ctx: _Context) -> None:
511     if isinstance(expr, (Literal, Identifier)):
512         return
513 
514     if isinstance(expr, UnaryExpr):
515         _validate_expr(expr.operand, signatures, ctx)
516         return
517 
518     if isinstance(expr, AwaitExpr):
519         if not ctx.in_async_function:
520             raise SemanticError("'aguarde' só pode ser usado dentro de função assíncrona.")
521         _validate_expr(expr.expression, signatures, ctx)
522         return
523 
524     if isinstance(expr, BinaryExpr):
525         _validate_expr(expr.left, signatures, ctx)
526         _validate_expr(expr.right, signatures, ctx)
527         return
528 
529     if isinstance(expr, ListExpr):
530         for element in expr.elements:
531             _validate_expr(element, signatures, ctx)
532         return
533 
534     if isinstance(expr, DictExpr):
535         for key, value in expr.entries:
536             _validate_expr(key, signatures, ctx)
537             _validate_expr(value, signatures, ctx)
538         return
539 
540     if isinstance(expr, IndexExpr):
541         _validate_expr(expr.target, signatures, ctx)
542         _validate_expr(expr.index, signatures, ctx)
543         return
544 
545     if isinstance(expr, CallExpr):
546         _validate_expr(expr.callee, signatures, ctx)
547         for arg in expr.arguments:
548             _validate_expr(arg, signatures, ctx)
549 
550         if isinstance(expr.callee, Identifier):
551             name = expr.callee.name
552             if name in signatures:
553                 expected = signatures[name]
554                 got = len(expr.arguments)
555                 if expected != got:
556                     raise SemanticError(
557                         f"Função '{name}' esperava {expected} argumentos, recebeu {got}."
558                     )
559             elif name in _BUILTIN_ARITY:
560                 expected_builtin = _BUILTIN_ARITY[name]
561                 if expected_builtin is not None and len(expr.arguments) != expected_builtin:
562                     raise SemanticError(
563                         f"Builtin '{name}' esperava {expected_builtin} argumentos, "
564                         f"recebeu {len(expr.arguments)}."
565                     )
566         return
567 
568     raise SemanticError(f"Expressão sem validação semântica: {type(expr).__name__}")

397     for stmt in stmts:

400             _collect_signatures(stmt.body, signatures)

407         elif isinstance(stmt, TryStmt):

416     if isinstance(stmt, FunctionDecl):

418         for inner in stmt.body:

428         _validate_expr(stmt.condition, signatures, ctx)

430             _validate_stmt(
431                 inner,

433                 signatures,
434             )
435         if stmt.else_branch:
436             for inner in stmt.else_branch:
437                 _validate_stmt(
438                     inner,

440                     signatures,
441                 )
442         return
443 
444     if isinstance(stmt, WhileStmt):
445         _validate_expr(stmt.condition, signatures, ctx)
446         child_ctx = _Context(
447             in_function=ctx.in_function,
448             in_async_function=ctx.in_async_function,
449             loop_depth=ctx.loop_depth + 1,
450         )
451         for inner in stmt.body:
452             _validate_stmt(inner, child_ctx, signatures)
453         return
454 
455     if isinstance(stmt, TryStmt):
456         for inner in stmt.try_branch:
457             _validate_stmt(
458                 inner,
459                 _Context(ctx.in_function, ctx.in_async_function, ctx.loop_depth),
460                 signatures,
461             )
462         if stmt.catch_branch is not None:
463             for inner in stmt.catch_branch:
464                 _validate_stmt(

467                     signatures,

469         if stmt.finally_branch is not None:
470             for inner in stmt.finally_branch:
471                 _validate_stmt(

473                     _Context(ctx.in_function, ctx.in_async_function, ctx.loop_depth),
474                     signatures,
475                 )
476         return
477 
478     if isinstance(stmt, ThrowStmt):
479         _validate_expr(stmt.value, signatures, ctx)
480         return
481 
482     if isinstance(stmt, ReturnStmt):

485         if stmt.value is not None:

510 def _validate_expr(expr: Expr, signatures: dict[str, int], ctx: _Context) -> None:
511     if isinstance(expr, (Literal, Identifier)):

513 
514     if isinstance(expr, UnaryExpr):
515         _validate_expr(expr.operand, signatures, ctx)
516         return
517

519         if not ctx.in_async_function:
520             raise SemanticError("'aguarde' só pode ser usado dentro de função assíncrona.")
521         _validate_expr(expr.expression, signatures, ctx)
522         return
523 
524     if isinstance(expr, BinaryExpr):
525         _validate_expr(expr.left, signatures, ctx)
526         _validate_expr(expr.right, signatures, ctx)
527         return
528 
529     if isinstance(expr, ListExpr):
530         for element in expr.elements:
531             _validate_expr(element, signatures, ctx)
532         return
533 
534     if isinstance(expr, DictExpr):
535         for key, value in expr.entries:
536             _validate_expr(key, signatures, ctx)
537             _validate_expr(value, signatures, ctx)
538         return
539 
540     if isinstance(expr, IndexExpr):
541         _validate_expr(expr.target, signatures, ctx)
542         _validate_expr(expr.index, signatures, ctx)
543         return
544 
545     if isinstance(expr, CallExpr):
546         _validate_expr(expr.callee, signatures, ctx)
547         for arg in expr.arguments:
548             _validate_expr(arg, signatures, ctx)
549 
550         if isinstance(expr.callee, Identifier):

447             in_function=ctx.in_function,
448             in_async_function=ctx.in_async_function,
449             loop_depth=ctx.loop_depth + 1,
450         )
451         for inner in stmt.body:
452             _validate_stmt(inner, child_ctx, signatures)
453         return
454 
455     if isinstance(stmt, TryStmt):
456         for inner in stmt.try_branch:
457             _validate_stmt(
458                 inner,
459                 _Context(ctx.in_function, ctx.in_async_function, ctx.loop_depth),
460                 signatures,
461             )
462         if stmt.catch_branch is not None:
463             for inner in stmt.catch_branch:
464                 _validate_stmt(
465                     inner,
466                     _Context(ctx.in_function, ctx.in_async_function, ctx.loop_depth),
467                     signatures,
468                 )
469         if stmt.finally_branch is not None:
470             for inner in stmt.finally_branch:
471                 _validate_stmt(
472                     inner,
473                     _Context(ctx.in_function, ctx.in_async_function, ctx.loop_depth),
474                     signatures,
475                 )
476         return
477 
478     if isinstance(stmt, ThrowStmt):
479         _validate_expr(stmt.value, signatures, ctx)
480         return
481 
482     if isinstance(stmt, ReturnStmt):
483         if not ctx.in_function:
484             raise SemanticError("'retorne' só pode ser usado dentro de função.")
485         if stmt.value is not None:
486             _validate_expr(stmt.value, signatures, ctx)
487         return
488 
489     if isinstance(stmt, BreakStmt):
490         if ctx.loop_depth <= 0:
491             raise SemanticError("'pare' só pode ser usado dentro de laço.")
492         return
493 
494     if isinstance(stmt, ContinueStmt):
495         if ctx.loop_depth <= 0:
496             raise SemanticError("'continue' só pode ser usado dentro de laço.")
497         return
498 
499     if isinstance(stmt, AssignStmt):
500         _validate_expr(stmt.value, signatures, ctx)
501         return
502 
503     if isinstance(stmt, ExprStmt):
504         _validate_expr(stmt.expression, signatures, ctx)
505         return
506 
507     raise SemanticError(f"Statement sem validação semântica: {type(stmt).__name__}")
508 
509 
510 def _validate_expr(expr: Expr, signatures: dict[str, int], ctx: _Context) -> None:
511     if isinstance(expr, (Literal, Identifier)):
512         return
513 
514     if isinstance(expr, UnaryExpr):
515         _validate_expr(expr.operand, signatures, ctx)
516         return
517 
518     if isinstance(expr, AwaitExpr):
519         if not ctx.in_async_function:
520             raise SemanticError("'aguarde' só pode ser usado dentro de função assíncrona.")
521         _validate_expr(expr.expression, signatures, ctx)
522         return
523 
524     if isinstance(expr, BinaryExpr):
525         _validate_expr(expr.left, signatures, ctx)
526         _validate_expr(expr.right, signatures, ctx)
527         return
528 
529     if isinstance(expr, ListExpr):
530         for element in expr.elements:
531             _validate_expr(element, signatures, ctx)
532         return
533 
534     if isinstance(expr, DictExpr):
535         for key, value in expr.entries:
536             _validate_expr(key, signatures, ctx)
537             _validate_expr(value, signatures, ctx)
538         return
539 
540     if isinstance(expr, IndexExpr):
541         _validate_expr(expr.target, signatures, ctx)
542         _validate_expr(expr.index, signatures, ctx)
543         return
544 
545     if isinstance(expr, CallExpr):
546         _validate_expr(expr.callee, signatures, ctx)
547         for arg in expr.arguments:
548             _validate_expr(arg, signatures, ctx)
549 
550         if isinstance(expr.callee, Identifier):
551             name = expr.callee.name
552             if name in signatures:
553                 expected = signatures[name]
554                 got = len(expr.arguments)
555                 if expected != got:
556                     raise SemanticError(
557                         f"Função '{name}' esperava {expected} argumentos, recebeu {got}."
558                     )
559             elif name in _BUILTIN_ARITY:
560                 expected_builtin = _BUILTIN_ARITY[name]
561                 if expected_builtin is not None and len(expr.arguments) != expected_builtin:
562                     raise SemanticError(
563                         f"Builtin '{name}' esperava {expected_builtin} argumentos, "
564                         f"recebeu {len(expr.arguments)}."
565                     )
566         return
567 
568     raise SemanticError(f"Expressão sem validação semântica: {type(expr).__name__}")
